Everything can remain the same, except instead of hardcoding to a docs folder destination, it should dynamically get the repo name by getting the nearest ancestor .git folder and treating that folder's name as the repo name. So to be clear, the doc destination will be:

/home/delorenj/code/DeLoDocs/Projects/$REPO_NAME/docs/$DATE
